category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an ANSI C compiler; official SDCC homepage describes SDCC as a retargettable optimizing Standard C compiler suite for microprocessors.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is SDCC - Small Device C Compiler; source_facts.name is sdcc.
docs_sources: Official SDCC homepage links to Documentation and SDCC Manual PDF; the PDF is titled SDCC Compiler User Guide.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SDCC homepage links to svn repository, and the SourceForge project code page is labeled Small Device C Compiler (SDCC) Code (SVN).
tags_sources: source_facts.description lists Intel 8051, Maxim 80DS390, and Zilog Z80 targets; official homepage lists ANSI/ISO C compiler support and MCU targets including 8051, Z80, STM8, MOS 6502, and others.
